assertions.description: <link rel=prefetch> is parsed; relList contains 'prefetch' once set.
Sec-Purpose: prefetch — verify exact ASCII token spelling.
A Request inheriting standard credentials/cache modes can be constructed without throwing.
The local budget route sees no Sec-Purpose on a plain fetch and returns the full response decision.
A <link rel=prefetch> request to the local budget route records Sec-Purpose: prefetch and receives the slim decision.
The local budget route records multiple link prefetches and returns a blocked decision when the mock budget is exhausted.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const base='/v138/pass-sec-purpose-prefetch-header-with-link-rel-prefetch/prefetch-budget-monitor/budget-endpoint';const session='conf-budget-'+Date.now();await fetch(base+'?session='+session+'&reset=1',{cache:'no-store'});const nonces=['a','b','c'].map((id)=>id+'-'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2));for(const nonce of nonces){const link=document.createElement('link');link.rel='prefetch';link.href=base+'?session='+session+'&id='+nonce+'&resource=/'+nonce+'&label='+nonce+'&fullKb=90&slimKb=40&nonce='+nonce;document.head.appendChild(link);}const deadline=Date.now()+5000;while(Date.now()<deadline){const snapshot=await (await fetch(base+'?session='+session+'&read=1&_='+Date.now(),{cache:'no-store'})).json();if(snapshot.entries.length>=3){return snapshot.entries.some((entry)=>entry.decision==='blocked'&&entry.received.secPurpose==='prefetch')&&snapshot.usedKb===80;}await new Promise((resolve)=>setTimeout(resolve,150));}return false;})()

assertions.description: PerformanceObserver supports 'resource' entries — used to confirm prefetched resources arrive with the correct initiator/headers.
